label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 10

extraction.one_line_summary: GANNA Filippo won the 25.8km Valladolid ITT at 56kph, beating EVENEPOEL Remco by just 16 seconds while SEPP Kuss unexpectedly retained red.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates transformed into TT unit with AYUSO fourth at 50 seconds, revealing depth beyond traditional climbing focus.
ROGLIC Primoz checked speed repeatedly on technical descents yet limited losses to 36 seconds, showing conservative corner approach costs time.
SEPP Kuss delivered career-best TT under GC pressure, exceeding expectations for pure climber in leadership role under scrutiny.

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: maintained 56kph average on technical course with 500m climb, extending gaps at every split through superior power maintenance
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: only 16 seconds behind Ganna despite heavy race workload suggests fatigue hasn't compromised pure speed yet
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: finished seventh at 1:18 down with visible frustration, busy season workload finally showing cracks in form
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: 36 seconds lost while visibly overcautious on descents indicates technical corners cost him 20-25 seconds versus pure power
rider_signals.SEPP Kuss: positive: retained red jersey as pure climber in ITT beyond expectations, reduced margin sets up Laguna Negra defense
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: fourth at 50 seconds confirms UAE's TT transformation extends beyond Pogacar, unexpected GC weapon emerging
